'''Nelson Yomtov''' is a comic book [[Wikipedia:colorist|colorist]] who worked on a few issues of the [[Star Wars (1977)|''Marvel Star Wars'']] series.

{{Artist-stub}}

==Star Wars bibliography==
===Colorist===
*''[[Snow Fury!]]''
*''[[Showdown (Pizzazz)|Showdown]]''
*[[Star Wars (1977) 35|''Star Wars'' (1977) 35]]
*[[Star Wars (1977) 37|''Star Wars'' (1977) 37]]
*''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 2: Dark Encounters]]''

[[Category:Comic book colorists]]
